about.heroText: Pipol is a series of minimalist sculptures exploring <bold1>simplicity</bold1>, <bold2>balance</bold2>, and <bold3>presence</bold3>.
about.splitText: Born from an everyday object, the anonymous square-headed figures work as symbols — a direct and uncluttered way of being in the world.
about.statement: Between the handcrafted and the industrial, Pipol reclaims the beauty of the simple and the importance of the <bold>gesture</bold>.

contact.tagline: Every sculpture begins with a conversation.
